Container.Name: garage
Container.Overview: S3-compatible object storage — a lightweight MinIO alternative built for geo-distributed and single-node deployments alike. This image wraps upstream Garage v2.3.0 with env-var config (no TOML to edit) and auto-generates its three secrets plus the v2 cluster layout on first boot. [br]See the repo README for the bucket-and-key bootstrap command sequence used when pairing with Milvus.
Container.Description: Garage is a lightweight, efficient, S3-compatible object store. This template uses ghcr.io/iknox/garage-env, an env-configurable wrapper around upstream Garage v2.3.0 that also ships a `garage` CLI wrapper so `docker exec garage garage ...` works without env-var juggling.

Config.Name: S3 API
Config.Description: S3-compatible HTTP API. Expose to LAN if you want external S3 clients.

Config.Name: Admin API
Config.Description: Admin HTTP API — health checks and metrics.

Config.Name: Metadata
Config.Description: Metadata dir. Prefer a cache pool / SSD for performance. Secrets persist here as .garage-env-secrets.

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Bulk data dir. Array storage is fine.

Config.Name: GARAGE_S3_REGION
Config.Description: S3 region string. S3 clients must be configured with the same region.

Config.Name: GARAGE_DB_ENGINE
Config.Description: Metadata DB engine: sqlite (default) or lmdb.

Config.Name: GARAGE_RPC_SECRET
Config.Description: Leave blank to auto-generate on first boot.

Config.Name: GARAGE_ADMIN_TOKEN
Config.Description: Leave blank to auto-generate on first boot.

Config.Name: GARAGE_METRICS_TOKEN
Config.Description: Leave blank to auto-generate on first boot.
